messages.subject: [R-jobs] Finance job in New Jersey
messages.body_plain:
In addition to the below, we are heavy users of R.

Lion Cave Capital, a proprietary, algorithmic trading start-up, is seeking a
top-flight, innovative, recent Ph.D. in Mathematics, Physics, Machine
Learning, or Statistics. Programming excellence required, particularly
involving large data sets and real-time systems.

Lion Cave's real-time market analysis poses significant mathematical and
systems challenges, from management of massive data streams (billions of
events per day) to modeling of volatile markets.

Our tightly knit team seeks an individual to discover, implement, and
analyze new trading strategies, and to enhance our trading and analytical
infrastructure. As a member of a small company, you will participate in all
strategic decisions.

Lion Cave trades its own money, is self-sustaining and profitable. We have
no customers, sales staff, marketing team, or funding agency constraining
us. Technical considerations and trading results rule the day.

Interested? Please email your resume to hr2 at lioncavecapital.com

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
